Hey you guys, welcome to another Prestige Labs video on how to view commissions, commissions earned, real-time earnings. So first you're going to log into your account at distributor.PrestigeLabs.com. That's going to take you to the order page by default. Click on the My Account tab at the top and that's going to take you to your dashboard where you can see just kind of synopsis of various different reporting features from the different tabs on the left. So a variety of different short quick views. Go ahead for the purposes of this video, we're going to click on the Commissions Earned link here on the left-hand side. So click on that and that's going to take you to your Commissions Earned page. That's going to have the details of the commissions that you've earned thus far and been paid out. It's also going to have a snapshot down below of cancel and refund orders. You can click on these payout periods and get detailed information for each of these payouts. You've got the order count, the amount total, excuse me, the order amount, the order commission, cancel refunds, what's been carried forward, commission adjustments, if there's been any commission total, commission receipt. If you click on this, now like I say, this is Commissions Earned. If you click on this real-time earning link at the top, real-time earnings, click on that. That's going to take you to your real-time earnings versus commissions that have already been earned. These have not been paid out yet and transferred to that screen yet. So for instance, you can see we've got, this is from today. We've got two orders from today. This is the order numbers. This is the total amount of the orders for this order, total amount, that order, total amount, as well as the commission earned from each one of those orders. This will be included. This information here is the real-time earnings. So you can see what's going on as of right now versus the commissions earned is your payout information, just to draw a distinction between the two. Another thing I'd like to point out, and it's not viewable on this screen, but you can see right here we've got a five-digit order number. All these items are five-digit order numbers. That means they came from the distributor website. If it's a four-digit number, if there's only four digits, then it came from the refer site. And that's a way to quickly see a distinction between which site it came from. So these obviously all came from the distributor site, but if we would have had a four-digit code in here for an order number, we'd know it came from the refer site as well. All the refer site commissions are indeed brought over into the distributor site. So you don't have to manage them in two separate places. They are brought over to your commission's earned, and you will be paid out on those as well. So just wanted to give you a short breakdown of how to view your commission information as far as commission's earned, what's been paid, and real-time earnings. I hope that helped. Happy selling, guys.
